====Pokémon====
This listing is of Gary's known Pokémon in the manga:

|main=yes

|desc={{p|Arcanine}} is Gary's main Pokémon. It was usually relied on as a mode of transportation.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gary
|pkmn=Rhydon
|type1=Ground
|type2=Rock
|img=Gary Pkmn EToP.png
|epnum=ET19
|epname=Ash vs. Gary
|desc=Gary sent out {{p|Rhydon}} along with his other Pokémon to battle the giant Slowpoke after Arcanine became hypnotized by it. However, it wasn't long before it fell victim to the giant Pokémon.

None of Rhydon's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gary
|pkmn=Gyarados
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Gary Pkmn EToP.png
|epnum=ET19
|epname=Ash vs. Gary
|desc=Gary sent out {{p|Gyarados}} along with his other Pokémon to battle the giant Slowpoke after Arcanine became hypnotized by it. However, it wasn't long before it fell victim to the giant Pokémon. Later, Gary sent it out as a way of {{m|Surf|traveling on water}} so he can catch it after {{TRT}} came by and tried to steal it with their net.

None of Gyarados's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gary
|pkmn=Venusaur
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Gary Pkmn EToP.png
|epnum=ET19
|epname=Ash vs. Gary
|desc=Gary sent out {{p|Venusaur}} along with his other Pokémon to battle the giant Slowpoke after Arcanine became hypnotized by it. Similar to Arcanine, it wasn't able to battle the Slowpoke.

None of Venusaur's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gary

|type2=Flying
|img=Gary Pidgeot EToP.png
|epnum=ET19
|epname=Ash vs. Gary
|desc={{p|Pidgeot}} was sent out along with Gary's other Pokémon to battle the giant Slowpoke. It fell victim to the Slowpoke's laziness.

None of Pidgeot's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Gary
|main=no
|pkmn=Slowbro
|stage1=Slowpoke
|type1=Water
|type2=Psychic
|img=Ash Slowpoke.png
|cap=Gary's Slowpoke
|img2=Gary Slowbro EToP.png
|cap2=Gary's Slowbro
|epnum=ET19
|epname=Ash vs. Gary
|desc=Ash and his rival, Gary, both battled for a {{pkmn2|giant}} {{p|Slowpoke}}. Even though Ash was able to catch it, he gave it to Gary instead so he could get a picture of his sister, May. After this, they found out that Slowpoke had evolved into a {{p|Slowbro}}.

Slowbro's known moves are {{m|Disable}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Growl}}, {{m|Surf}}, and {{m|Headbutt}}.}}
